title: Particle Culling
description: Block individual particle types via Mod Menu to boost game FPS. / Блокируйте отдельные типы частиц через Mod Menu для повышения FPS.
body:
# Particle Culling

A client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that allows you to block individual particle types in-game via Cloth Config and Mod Menu. Blocking heavy or unnecessary particles (like potion effect swirls, area effect clouds, explosion particles, etc.) helps to significantly increase game performance (FPS) and clean up visual clutter.

## Features
- **Dynamic Particle Registry**: Lists all registered particles dynamically (including those added by other mods!).
- **Quick Controls**: Disable or enable all particles in one click.
- **Custom Selection**: Fine-tune exactly which particles to block and which to keep rendering.
- **Improved FPS**: Prevents rendering of blocked particle types completely.

## Requirements
- **Minecraft**
- **Fabric Loader**
- **Fabric API**
- **Cloth Config API** (Included / Required)
- **Mod Menu** (Highly Recommended to access config screen)

## License
This mod is available under the MIT license.
